relationships.description: Pigeonpea hybrids studied are of short duration
Pigeonpea is a member of the pulses group
Pulses are major sources of proteins
India is the largest producer and consumer of pulses
Pulses have twice the protein content of wheat
Pulses have thrice the protein content of rice
